name: Salsa Verde with Tuna
recipeIngredient: 1 2 oz. can flat anchovy fillets, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor or blender, process parsley, basil, garlic, anchovies, oil, and lemon juice until smooth.
2. With hands, fold in the tuna. Season with pepper as desired. Use immediately or chill at room temperature and store in refrigerator or freezer (see Timesaver Tip).
3. To serve: Cook 8 ounces thin spaghetti according to package instructions. Drain. Toss pasta with 2 tablespoons olive oil, then with sauce. Top with sliced black olives, slivered dried tomatoes in oil (pumpette), or freshly grated Parmesan cheese.
Makes 1-1/4 cups.
Timesaver Tip: Sauce can be prepared up to 1 day ahead, covered and refrigerated, or frozen at 0°F for up to 3 months. To serve, thaw sauce in microwave on Defrost setting for 8 to 12 minutes, stirring several times, or in refrigerator for 8 to 24 hours. Gently warm sauce in a pan or microwave on 50% power for 1 to 3 minutes. Sauce should be at room temperature or barely warm when combined with pasta.
Note: If basil is not available, use 2-1/2 cups packed parsley sprigs and 1-1/2 to 2 tablespoons dried basil.
